---
author: Sam White
toc-title: Contents
toc-depth: 5
toc-location: left
title: Samples Submitted - Salmon Kidney Tissue to SolusCell for Cristian Gallardo
date: '2026-03-30'
draft: false
engine: knitr
categories: 
  - "2026"
  - "Samples Submitted"
---
# INTRO

Steven [asked me to submit some salmon kidney tissue samples to SolusCell for RNA-seq](https://github.com/RobertsLab/resources/issues/2410) (GitHub Issue). The samples are for Cristian Gallardo from the University of Concepción in Chile. Samples were shipped on dry ice via FedEx on 2026-03-30. The tracking number is: 870130241319.
